subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be ever engaged in His remembrance, thanksgiving and praise. The world hath occupied mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال بذکر و شکر و حمد الهی مشغول باشی عالمرا دنیا مشغول نموده و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
